criteria.reason: The template problem was identified as fixed Finale formulas such as D21:D23 in 4_WINDOW_AGGREGATES.
Generated workbooks rewrite Finale formulas from segment timing; a 10-second synthetic video selected rows D7:D8 for the final 3-second overlap.
The selected row range changes from timing and is not hard-coded to rows 21-23 or the last three rows when timing exists.
Without usable timing, generation falls back to the last three available rows.
Generated Finale row label is rewritten to Finale last 3s instead of a fixed 18-20s label.
Python syntax, helper checks, synthetic workbook formula checks, and diff whitespace checks passed.

commands_run: Unit helper check for _finale_window_rows via python stdin
Synthetic workbook generation with timing and fallback cases via python stdin
